name: Patient 9
history: Long-standing friendship with disabled friend Jersey whom she supports. Ongoing conflict with roommate Ashby over household issues.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be taken advantage of
intermediate_belief: My needs don't matter; I exist to serve others.
intermediate_belief_depression: No one respects my boundaries; I'll always be the responsible one.
coping_strategies: Passive aggression, complaining to others instead of confronting, overfunctioning.
situation: The kitchen becomes dirty because Ashby does not take out the trash after cooking.
auto_thought: "Why do I always have to clean up after everyone? No one respects me."
behavior: Cleans the kitchen angrily, slams cabinets, texts Jersey to complain.
